name: Corn and Bacon Spoonbread
recipeInstructions: Combine cornmeal and water; bring to a boil, and boil 1 minute or until thickened, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Add cheese, corn, butter, garlic, and salt; stir until cheese melts. Stir in milk. Beat egg yolks at medium speed of an electric mixer until thick and lemon-colored; add bacon. Stir into cornmeal mixture. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry; gently fold into cornmeal mixture. Pour into a lightly greased 2-1/2-quart casserole. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour or until a knife inserted in center comes out clean. Yield: 10 servings.
